instruction: I'd like to wash my pillow while taking a bath, and I also want to display the teddy bear in the living room. Please bring the pillow to the bathroom and move the teddy bear to the living room.
target_description: I'd like to wash my pillow while taking a bath, and I also want to display the teddy bear in the living room. Please bring the pillow to the bathroom and move the teddy bear to the living room.
